checksum_scope: exact vendored public source; sha256 equals local_sha256
license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 via OEDI unless otherwise noted
transformation: Parse PSS/E RAW buses, active loads, generator bounds, branches, and two-winding transformers; map ROP generator dispatch records through active-power dispatch tables to published piecewise-linear cost tables; parse published CON outages and record INL response-limit provenance. Convert only active MW load/generation values to kW, retain MVA ratings without assuming a power factor, and record Challenge 1 as one steady-state period with no invented duration. Select connected load-deficit islands and treat all selected-island active load as critical rather than inventing a critical-load fraction. No synthetic grid values are added.
version: ARPA-E GO Challenge 1 Original Dataset 2 Offline Edition 2 Network_01O-020 scenario_1 (2019-03-25 public snapshot)

source_name: NREL 2024 Electricity ATB selected SC-CMPO upgrade costs

checksum_scope: exact vendored public source; sha256 equals local_sha256
transformation: Parse OpenDSS lines, line-code resistance/reactance matrices, phase connections, loads, transformers, regulator controls, capacitors, and switch state; aggregate only public load records by base bus while retaining each phase connection; and construct deterministic line/transformer N-1 contingencies. Published IEEE123 line codes do not specify ampacity, so line ratings remain explicitly unavailable rather than using OpenDSS engine defaults. Treat all selected-island active load as critical instead of inventing a critical-load fraction. PV/BESS options use only the pinned NREL ATB catalog. No topology, impedance, DER, line rating, or load value is invented.
